findings: Nested commander display reads progress_dir/swarm-state.json and prints squads/workers targets and telemetry counters; defaults (50/250) align with launcher-seeded swarm-state.json.

Critical metaswarm bug: orphan recovery checks commander heartbeat at $BASE/commanders/<task_id>/swarm-state.json, where task_id comes from claimed task JSON. Commander state is actually stored under $BASE/commanders/<commander_id>/swarm-state.json, so commander_active resolves false and claimed tasks may be incorrectly re-queued after ORPHAN_RECOVERY_AFTER even while commander is running.
Minor: commander line hardcodes label "full SS-250" rather than reading swarm_scale from state.
